HERO.TITLE: BID. WIN. REPEAT.
HERO.DESCRIPTION: The safest online auction platform. Sell fast or catch unique deals.

ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: BidSphere is a modern online auction platform built to make buying and selling through bidding simple, secure, and exciting. We connect thousands of buyers and sellers across a wide range of categories through a transparent, fair process for everyone.

SECURE.TITLE: Secure & Trusted
SECURE.DESCRIPTION: Every transaction is protected, so you can bid with confidence.

REALTIME.TITLE: Real-Time Bidding
REALTIME.DESCRIPTION: Watch prices update live and never miss a winning moment.

COMMUNITY.TITLE: Growing Community
COMMUNITY.DESCRIPTION: Thousands of buyers and sellers active across every category.

TECHNOLOGY.NAME: Technology
TECHNOLOGY.DESCRIPTION: Cutting-edge gadgets and the latest electronics.

AUCTIONS.EMPTY: No auctions ending soon right now — check back shortly.

HELP.TITLE: Help Center
HELP.INFORMATION: Find quick answers, reach us by phone, or chat with our AI assistant.

GUEST.MESSAGE: To open a ticket and receive technical support, you need to log in to your account.

PLACE_BID.QUESTION: How do I place a bid on an auction?
PLACE_BID.ANSWER: Go to the page of the item you want and enter your amount in the "Bid now" field. Your bid must be higher than the current price.

CANCEL_BID.QUESTION: Can I cancel a bid after placing it?
CANCEL_BID.ANSWER: Bids are binding once placed and generally cannot be cancelled. Please make sure of your amount before confirming.

WIN_AUCTION.QUESTION: How do I know if I won an auction?
WIN_AUCTION.ANSWER: You will receive an email and an in-app notification when the auction ends and you have the highest bid.

CREATE_ACCOUNT.QUESTION: How do I create an account?
CREATE_ACCOUNT.ANSWER: Click "Register" in the top menu, fill in your username, email and password, then confirm your email address to activate your account.

FORGOT_PASSWORD.QUESTION: I forgot my password. What should I do?
FORGOT_PASSWORD.ANSWER: Click "Forgot password?" on the login page and follow the instructions sent to your registered email address.

ITEM_DELIVERY.QUESTION: How is the item delivered after I win?
ITEM_DELIVERY.ANSWER: After payment confirmation, the seller will arrange shipping or pickup. Delivery details are exchanged through your account messages.

NOT_DELIVERED.QUESTION: What happens if the seller does not deliver the item?
NOT_DELIVERED.ANSWER: Contact our support team immediately using the form below. We investigate all disputes and may suspend sellers who fail to deliver.

SHIPPING_COST.QUESTION: Who pays for shipping?
SHIPPING_COST.ANSWER: The buyer pays the shipping costs unless the seller offers free shipping.

PAYOUT.QUESTION: When do I get paid?
PAYOUT.ANSWER: Payments are transferred to your bank account within 3–5 business days after the buyer's payment is confirmed.

LIST_ITEM.QUESTION: How do I list an item for sale?
LIST_ITEM.ANSWER: Go to the "My Profile" section and click "Add Auction". Fill in the details and wait for administrator approval.

EDIT_AUCTION.QUESTION: Can I edit or remove an auction after posting it?
EDIT_AUCTION.ANSWER: You can edit or remove an auction only before it receives its first bid. After that, changes are locked to protect bidders.

NOT_SOLD.QUESTION: What if my item does not sell?
NOT_SOLD.ANSWER: You can lower the reserve price and relist the item or offer it to the highest bidder.

FOOTER.ABOUT_TEXT_1: BidSphere is a modern online auction platform designed to make buying and selling through bidding simple, secure, and exciting.
FOOTER.ABOUT_TEXT_2: We connect thousands of buyers and sellers across a wide range of categories, offering a transparent and fair bidding process for everyone. Whether you're looking for a great deal or hoping to sell to the right buyer, BidSphere gives you the tools and trust you need to bid with confidence.
